purpose: Authoritative artwork-to-primary-image ownership for image discovery, structured data, artwork navigation, and multilingual pages.

recordPolicy.publicModel: One governed core record in three languages, with extended evidence modules only where verified.
recordPolicy.unknownCommercialFacts: Do not infer edition, process, dimensions, signature, certificate, framing, price, availability, production, shipping, or care facts. Confirm them in a work-specific written offer.

artworks.title: Bank of China Light Trails
artworks.alt: Hong Kong skyscrapers and buses with sweeping light trails at night.
artworks.caption: Bank of China Light Trails, City Light series. © Ricky Kwok.

artworks.title: Blue Column
artworks.alt: A vertical blue water column and droplet suspended against a blue background.
artworks.caption: Blue Column, Collision series. © Ricky Kwok.

artworks.title: Blue Hour, River Stage
artworks.alt: Cormorant fishermen on a river at blue hour with warm lamps reflected in the water.
artworks.caption: Blue Hour, River Stage, Ritual series. © Ricky Kwok.

artworks.title: Breaking Point
artworks.alt: An egg cracking with shell and liquid fragments suspended against black.
artworks.caption: Breaking Point, Collision series. © Ricky Kwok.

artworks.title: Coil Field
artworks.alt: A worker among repeated coils in a monochrome industrial landscape.
artworks.caption: Coil Field, Ritual series. © Ricky Kwok.

artworks.title: Color Burst
artworks.alt: A fish interrupted by an explosion of coloured powder against black.
artworks.caption: Color Burst, Collision series. © Ricky Kwok.

artworks.title: Cranes and Towers
artworks.alt: Construction cranes and Hong Kong towers seen through a foreground barrier in monochrome.
artworks.caption: Cranes and Towers, City Light series. © Ricky Kwok.

artworks.title: Dragon Night Festival
artworks.alt: A fire dragon procession moving through a Hong Kong street at night.
artworks.caption: Dragon Night Festival, Ritual series. © Ricky Kwok.

artworks.title: Fishpond Harvest / 漁獲
artworks.alt: A fishpond worker standing among nets and fish during a harvest in Hong Kong.
artworks.caption: Fishpond Harvest / 漁獲, Hong Kong, 2014. © Ricky Kwok.
artworks.recognition: Student Landscape Champion, Hong Kong Bird Watching Society's 2014 Hong Kong Fishpond Photography Competition

artworks.title: Flower Impact
artworks.alt: A flower breaking into petals and fragments against a black background.
artworks.caption: Flower Impact, Collision series. © Ricky Kwok.

artworks.title: Green Orb
artworks.alt: A dark green water droplet hovering above a liquid surface against a bright green field.
artworks.caption: Green Orb, Collision series. © Ricky Kwok.

artworks.title: Ice Crown
artworks.alt: A boxer with water exploding over his head against a dark background.
artworks.caption: Ice Crown, Collision series. © Ricky Kwok.

artworks.title: Light Encroached Homes / 光染民居
artworks.alt: Low-angle fisheye photograph of illuminated advertising signs and residential buildings around the Mong Kok night sky.
artworks.caption: Light Encroached Homes / 光染民居, Mong Kok, Hong Kong, 2014. © Ricky Kwok.
artworks.recognition: Champion, Light Pollution Photography Competition 2014, The University of Hong Kong; selected from 154 entries

artworks.title: Magenta Collision
artworks.alt: A dense water collision illuminated in saturated magenta.
artworks.caption: Magenta Collision, Collision series. © Ricky Kwok.

artworks.title: Night Fishermen
artworks.alt: Two fishermen holding glowing lamps beside a river at night.
artworks.caption: Night Fishermen, Ritual series. © Ricky Kwok.

artworks.title: Orange Droplet
artworks.alt: A falling orange droplet almost touching a rising peak of water.
artworks.caption: Orange Droplet, Collision series. © Ricky Kwok.

artworks.title: Shunkan / Instant
artworks.alt: A cigarette breaking into ash and blue smoke against a black background.
artworks.caption: Shunkan / Instant, Collision series. © Ricky Kwok.

artworks.title: Start Sequence
artworks.alt: Swimmers diving in sequence over coloured lane lines.
artworks.caption: Start Sequence, Motion series. © Ricky Kwok.

artworks.title: Street Procession
artworks.alt: Pedestrians walking past a wall mural whose painted figures mirror their movement.
artworks.caption: Street Procession, City Light series. © Ricky Kwok.

artworks.title: Swimming in Motion
artworks.alt: Swimmers blurred into layered colour and water across racing lanes.
artworks.caption: Swimming in Motion, Motion series. © Ricky Kwok.

artworks.title: Terraces at Golden Hour
artworks.alt: Rice terraces reflecting golden light across a mountain slope.
artworks.caption: Terraces at Golden Hour, Ritual series. © Ricky Kwok.

artworks.title: The Pack
artworks.alt: A tightly packed group of racehorses and riders turning at speed.
artworks.caption: The Pack, Motion series. © Ricky Kwok.
